predictions.speaker: Bob Kultgen
predictions.prediction: A nuclear weapon will be used in Ukraine within 30 to 40 days.
predictions.context: Chad is reviewing a past prediction Bob made on January 29th. Bob had predicted a nuclear weapon would be used in Ukraine within a specific timeframe.

predictions.speaker: Bob Kultgen
predictions.prediction: The Chinese are about to attack Taiwan.
predictions.context: During his opening rant, Bob asserts that China is systematically preparing to take over and that an attack on Taiwan is imminent.

predictions.speaker: Bob Kultgen
predictions.prediction: The Chinese are systematically going to shut down all of our grids. People who rely on plastic/electronic payments won't be able to access their bank accounts.
predictions.context: Continuing his rant about a Chinese takeover, Bob predicts a coordinated attack on US infrastructure and financial systems.

predictions.speaker: Bob Kultgen
predictions.prediction: Donald Trump will never go to jail because 'our side' will 'go to guns' and 'start killing liberals' if they try.
predictions.context: In response to Trump's legal troubles, Bob predicts violent retaliation from Trump supporters to prevent him from being imprisoned.

predictions.speaker: Bob Kultgen
predictions.prediction: The FBI will be reorganized, and all the people at the top, including Christopher Wray, 'will be swinging' (implying executed).
predictions.context: In response to a listener's comment about the FBI, Bob predicts a drastic purge and restructuring of the agency.

predictions.speaker: Bob Kultgen
predictions.prediction: It's just a matter of months before the FBI gets reorganized.
predictions.context: Reiterating his earlier point about the FBI being a 'crooked operation,' Bob gives a more specific timeframe for its reorganization.

predictions.speaker: Mary Lou Kultgen
predictions.prediction: We're worried our grandchildren won't be alive (due to the state of the country).
predictions.context: Responding to a listener's question about whether they worry what their grandkids think of them, Mary Lou shifts to a fear for their survival.

predictions.speaker: Bob Kultgen
predictions.prediction: They will assassinate Donald Trump because that's the only way they're going to get rid of him.
predictions.context: Discussing Trump's indictments, Bob expresses his 'biggest fear' that political opponents will resort to assassination.

predictions.speaker: Bob Kultgen
predictions.prediction: If Donald Trump goes to jail, 'gloves come off' and 'bullets are going to fucking fly.' There will be a war in America that will make the Civil War look like a 'puppy stand,' with people dying in the streets within a week.
predictions.context: Chad asks what their reaction would be if Trump is sentenced to prison. Bob predicts widespread, violent civil conflict.
predictions.timeframe: within a week of Trump going to jail

predictions.speaker: Bob Kultgen
predictions.prediction: If Trump goes to jail, Christopher Wray and 'his little fucking FBI' will be the first ones to 'get popped.'
predictions.context: Elaborating on the violent response to a Trump imprisonment, Bob singles out the FBI director for retaliation.

predictions.speaker: Bob Kultgen
predictions.prediction: Your media is already starting to turn on you. You watch.
predictions.context: During a heated argument, Bob tells Chad that the mainstream media Chad supposedly represents will begin to criticize the left.

predictions.speaker: Mary Lou Kultgen
predictions.prediction: If Donald Trump gets sentenced to prison time, he'll be elected president (from prison).
predictions.context: Chad asks what they think will happen to Trump in prison. Mary Lou predicts he will still be elected president.

predictions.speaker: Bob Kultgen
predictions.prediction: Oklahoma Governor Kevin Stitt won't win again.
predictions.context: Discussing Stitt's endorsement of DeSantis, Bob, an Oklahoma resident, predicts Stitt will lose his next election.

predictions.speaker: Bob Kultgen
predictions.prediction: Ron DeSantis is losing ground every fucking day.
predictions.context: Discussing the GOP primary, Bob asserts that DeSantis's support is continuously eroding.

predictions.speaker: Mary Lou Kultgen
predictions.prediction: If Ron DeSantis picks up more steam and high-profile endorsements, he will then become probably Trump's VP pick.
predictions.context: Chad asks if DeSantis gaining momentum would matter to them. Mary Lou predicts it would lead to a Trump-DeSantis ticket.

predictions.speaker: Mary Lou Kultgen
predictions.prediction: Donald Trump's vice presidential candidate will be Kari Lake.
predictions.context: Mary Lou amends a previous prediction about DeSantis being VP, now predicting the Arizona Republican will get the spot.

predictions.speaker: Bob Kultgen
predictions.prediction: If Donald Trump becomes president again, revenge will be a thing. People like Jim Comey, Christopher Wray, and the '51 people who signed that letter' are all going to jail.
predictions.context: Arguing why the establishment fears Trump, Bob predicts Trump will prosecute his political enemies upon returning to office.
predictions.timeframe: during a potential second Trump term

predictions.speaker: Bob Kultgen
predictions.prediction: Companies like Target that promote 'transgender clothes and all that crap' are going broke.
predictions.context: During the discussion on 'wokeness,' Bob claims the backlash is causing financial ruin for companies embracing LGBTQ+ marketing.

predictions.speaker: Bob Kultgen
predictions.prediction: Target is gonna go broke. All these companies, Kohl's is gonna go broke. Chick-fil-A is gonna lose their ass.
predictions.context: In the 'wokeness' segment, Bob reiterates and expands his prediction that companies embracing LGBTQ+ themes will face financial collapse.

predictions.speaker: Bob Kultgen
predictions.prediction: Anheuser-Busch (Bud Light) is going fucking broke.
predictions.context: Specifically discussing the Bud Light/Dylan Mulvaney controversy, Bob predicts the parent company will face financial ruin.

predictions.speaker: Bob Kultgen
predictions.prediction: We don't know what morning we're going to wake up and the Chinese have invaded Taiwan and then the party's over.
predictions.context: Stating their new motto 'one day at a time,' Bob expresses the imminent fear of a Chinese invasion of Taiwan.
